content: The curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanism at the core of autonomous ICM agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and retrieval gate for cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, prioritizing storing and recalling unexpected, high-information unlabeled data points that the agent is inherently curious about over static relevance scoring. This creates a memory architecture that aligns what the active learning agent stores with what it most needs to query for labeling next, closing the loop between memory management and active sample selection.
